description: One series over an ordered sequence, on one axis. Dependency-free SVG with a crosshair that snaps to the nearest point, and a visually-hidden table of the same numbers.

labels.description: One label per point, in the same order as `values`. A label with no value at its index is dropped.

values.description: The plotted data, in order. One point per entry; a negative value clamps to the baseline.

seriesLabel.description: Names the series for the accessible name, the table caption and its value column. Absent falls back to the chart type alone.

slot.description: The identity colour from the categorical ramp. A line is one series, so there is no per-mark override.

tone.description: Semantic colour, for a series that IS a state. Mutually exclusive with slot — passing both warns in development and tone wins.

area.description: Fill under the line at 18% of the series colour — a tint, never a gradient. For a single series; two fills occlude each other.

valueSuffix.description: Appended verbatim to every number the chart draws — the axis ticks, the tooltip and the accessible table. Carries its own leading space if one is wanted.
